title: Skyland
description: The Skyland adds more proggesion to Minecraft via a Vannila-Style Sky Dimension
body:
Is Minecraft way too short? How about we change that![Mod´s Logo, kinda looks fire tbh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb4c61c78ad6642421c6da7d5f6b381bd777c8d2.png)

The Skyland adds a new Dimension to Minecraft, with 4 new biomes, it also adds 2 structures, more than 200 building blocks, AND Progression ( You now also need freeze charges that are crafted from freeze rods to craft ender eyes )

( You can see all photos on gallery section )
 
  
Trust Forest

 This biome is the home of Trust Wood, a pinky-like wood that stands out in build, its also home of the Trust Phantom, that can be rided by the player being the first flying rideable mob, The Trust phantom drops Trust Membranes that can be used to craft haste potions

 Sky Forest

 The Most Common Skyland Biome, It has the Sky Wood, the first white wood to exist, it is home for the Sky Cow, which drops Sky Steak, that when eaten, gives a speed effect

 Spirit Sand Valley

 The Spirit Sand valley is home for the new type of stone, Spirit Sand, Spirit Sand is the exact opposite of Soul Sand, it does not let you slow, it lets you faster, it can make item transportation SO MUCH easier

 Mint Deltas

 What if those pretty looking azalea caves where a overworld biome? well, thats what the Mint Deltas is! Its a biome full of azalea, swamp trees and more, in my opinion, the best looking biome in this mod! by the way you can check all of the mods photos on the gallery :)

 The Best part is that theres Even More!
 Theres so much out there to explore! including new ores, structures, biomes, and so much more! AND i update quite a lot so go download the latest version and try out the new features! as always, you can see all the rest of the features in depth on the gallery section, thank you so much on the support on the End Update Concept Mod! Love y´all :)



 Mod Was inspirated by the Aether Mod, from KingbDogz ( and the Aether Team ) MIT License
